mapper.sql: c.coupon_no AS couponNo, c.coupon_code AS couponCode, c.seller_no AS sellerNo, c.coupon_type AS couponType, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.benefit_type AS benefitType, c.benefit_value AS benefitValue, c.min_order_price AS minOrderPrice, c.max_discount_price AS maxDiscountPrice, c.issue_limit AS issueLimit, c.start_date AS startDate, c.end_date AS endDate, c.caution, c.status, c.reg_date AS regDate, sp.company_name AS companyName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_issue ci WHERE ci.coupon_no = c.coupon_no AND ci.status NOT IN ('삭제', 'DELETED')) AS issuedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_issue ci WHERE ci.coupon_no = c.coupon_no AND (ci.status IN ('사용', 'USED') OR ci.used_date IS NOT NULL)) AS usedCount
FROM coupon c LEFT JOIN seller_profile sp ON c.seller_no = sp.seller_no

sql.where:
c.status NOT IN ('DELETED', '삭제')
AND
CAST(c.coupon_no AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
c.coupon_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
c.coupon_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
sp.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( CAST(c.coupon_no AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.coupon_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.coupon_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sp.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE c.status NOT IN ('DELETED', '삭제') ORDER BY c.coupon_no DESC

SELECT
WHERE c.status NOT IN ('DELETED', '삭제') ORDER BY c.coupon_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon c WHERE c.status NOT IN ('DELETED', '삭제')

SELECT
WHERE c.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND c.status NOT IN ('DELETED', '삭제')
AND
CAST(c.coupon_no AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
c.coupon_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
(CAST(c.coupon_no AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.coupon_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY c.coupon_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon c WHERE c.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND c.status NOT IN ('DELETED', '삭제')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon c WHERE c.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND c.status NOT IN ('DELETED', '삭제')
AND
CAST(c.coupon_no AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
c.coupon_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
(CAST(c.coupon_no AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.coupon_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon ( coupon_code, seller_no, coupon_type, coupon_name, benefit_type, benefit_value, min_order_price, max_discount_price, issue_limit, start_date, end_date, caution, status, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{couponCode}, #{sellerNo}, #{couponType}, #{couponName}, #{benefitType}, COALESCE(#{benefitValue}, 0), COALESCE(#{minOrderPrice}, 0), COALESCE(#{maxDiscountPrice}, 0), #{issueLimit}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{caution}, COALESCE(#{status}, '사용'), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET coupon_code = #{couponCode}, seller_no = #{sellerNo}, coupon_type = #{couponType}, coupon_name = #{couponName}, benefit_type = #{benefitType}, benefit_value = COALESCE(#{benefitValue}, 0), min_order_price = COALESCE(#{minOrderPrice}, 0), max_discount_price = COALESCE(#{maxDiscountPrice}, 0), issue_limit = #{issueLimit}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, caution = #{caution}, status = #{status} WHERE coupon_no = #{couponNo}

UPDATE coupon SET status = '삭제' WHERE coupon_no IN
#{couponNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT ci.issue_no AS couponIssueNo, c.coupon_no AS couponNo, c.seller_no AS sellerNo, c.coupon_name AS couponName,
CASE WHEN REPLACE(c.coupon_type, ' ', '') IN ('주문상품할인', '회원가입축하') THEN 'ORDER'
WHEN REPLACE(c.coupon_type, ' ', '') = '개별상품할인' THEN 'PRODUCT'
WHEN REPLACE(c.coupon_type, ' ', '') = '배송비무료' THEN 'FREE_SHIPPING'
ELSE REPLACE(c.coupon_type, ' ', '') END AS couponType,
CASE WHEN REPLACE(c.benefit_type, ' ', '') IN ('금액할인', 'AMOUNT', 'FIXED') THEN 'AMOUNT'
WHEN REPLACE(c.benefit_type, ' ', '') IN ('비율할인', 'PERCENT', 'RATE') THEN 'RATE'
WHEN REPLACE(c.benefit_type, ' ', '') IN ('무료배송', 'FREE_SHIPPING') THEN 'FREE_SHIPPING'
ELSE REPLACE(c.benefit_type, ' ', '') END AS benefitType,
COALESCE(c.benefit_value, 0) AS benefitValue, COALESCE(c.min_order_price, 0) AS minOrderPrice, COALESCE(c.max_discount_price, 0) AS maxDiscountPrice
FROM coupon_issue ci
JOIN coupon c ON ci.coupon_no = c.coupon_no
WHERE ci.member_no = #{memberNo} AND ci.status IN ('발급', 'ISSUED') AND c.status IN ('ACTIVE', '사용') AND (c.start_date IS NULL OR CURDATE() >= c.start_date) AND (c.end_date IS NULL OR CURDATE() <= c.end_date) AND ( c.issue_limit IS NULL OR c.issue_limit >= ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_issue limit_ci WHERE limit_ci.coupon_no = c.coupon_no AND limit_ci.status NOT IN ('삭제', 'DELETED') ) )
ORDER BY ci.issue_no DESC

SELECT ci.issue_no AS couponIssueNo, c.coupon_no AS couponNo, c.seller_no AS sellerNo, c.coupon_name AS couponName,
CASE WHEN REPLACE(c.coupon_type, ' ', '') IN ('주문상품할인', '회원가입축하') THEN 'ORDER'
WHEN REPLACE(c.coupon_type, ' ', '') = '개별상품할인' THEN 'PRODUCT'
WHEN REPLACE(c.coupon_type, ' ', '') = '배송비무료' THEN 'FREE_SHIPPING'
ELSE REPLACE(c.coupon_type, ' ', '') END AS couponType,
CASE WHEN REPLACE(c.benefit_type, ' ', '') IN ('금액할인', 'AMOUNT', 'FIXED') THEN 'AMOUNT'
WHEN REPLACE(c.benefit_type, ' ', '') IN ('비율할인', 'PERCENT', 'RATE') THEN 'RATE'
WHEN REPLACE(c.benefit_type, ' ', '') IN ('무료배송', 'FREE_SHIPPING') THEN 'FREE_SHIPPING'
ELSE REPLACE(c.benefit_type, ' ', '') END AS benefitType,
COALESCE(c.benefit_value, 0) AS benefitValue, COALESCE(c.min_order_price, 0) AS minOrderPrice, COALESCE(c.max_discount_price, 0) AS maxDiscountPrice
FROM coupon_issue ci
JOIN coupon c ON ci.coupon_no = c.coupon_no
WHERE ci.member_no = #{memberNo} AND ci.issue_no = #{couponIssueNo} AND ci.status IN ('발급', 'ISSUED') AND c.status IN ('ACTIVE', '사용') AND (c.start_date IS NULL OR CURDATE() >= c.start_date) AND (c.end_date IS NULL OR CURDATE() <= c.end_date) AND ( c.issue_limit IS NULL OR c.issue_limit >= ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_issue limit_ci WHERE limit_ci.coupon_no = c.coupon_no AND limit_ci.status NOT IN ('삭제', 'DELETED') ) )
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon_issue SET status = '사용', order_no = #{orderNo}, used_date = NOW() WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND issue_no = #{couponIssueNo} AND status IN ('발급', 'ISSUED')
mapper.select: SELECT c.coupon_no AS couponNo, c.coupon_code AS couponCode, c.seller_no AS sellerNo, c.coupon_type AS couponType, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.benefit_type AS benefitType, COALESCE(c.benefit_value, 0) AS benefitValue, COALESCE(c.min_order_price, 0) AS minOrderPrice, COALESCE(c.max_discount_price, 0) AS maxDiscountPrice, c.issue_limit AS issueLimit, c.start_date AS startDate, c.end_date AS endDate, c.caution AS caution, c.status AS status, c.reg_date AS regDate FROM coupon c WHERE c.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND c.coupon_code = CONCAT('FIRST_SELLER_', #{sellerNo}) AND REPLACE(c.coupon_type, ' ', '') = '개별상품할인' AND c.status IN ('사용', 'ACTIVE') LIMIT 1

SELECT c.coupon_no AS couponNo, c.coupon_code AS couponCode, c.seller_no AS sellerNo, c.coupon_type AS couponType, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.benefit_type AS benefitType, COALESCE(c.benefit_value, 0) AS benefitValue, COALESCE(c.min_order_price, 0) AS minOrderPrice, COALESCE(c.max_discount_price, 0) AS maxDiscountPrice, c.issue_limit AS issueLimit, c.start_date AS startDate, c.end_date AS endDate, c.caution AS caution, c.status AS status, c.reg_date AS regDate FROM coupon c WHERE c.seller_no = #{sellerNo} AND c.status IN ('사용', 'ACTIVE') AND c.coupon_code NOT LIKE 'FIRST_SELLER_%' AND c.coupon_code NOT LIKE 'AUTO_PRODUCT_%' AND REPLACE(c.coupon_type, ' ', '') IN ( '개별상품할인', '배송비무료', '주문상품할인' ) AND (c.start_date IS NULL OR CURDATE() >= c.start_date) AND (c.end_date IS NULL OR CURDATE() <= c.end_date) AND ( c.issue_limit IS NULL OR c.issue_limit > ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_issue ci WHERE ci.coupon_no = c.coupon_no AND ci.status NOT IN ('삭제', 'DELETED') ) ) ORDER BY c.coupon_no DESC

SELECT c.coupon_no AS couponNo, c.coupon_code AS couponCode, c.seller_no AS sellerNo, c.coupon_type AS couponType, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.benefit_type AS benefitType, COALESCE(c.benefit_value, 0) AS benefitValue, COALESCE(c.min_order_price, 0) AS minOrderPrice, COALESCE(c.max_discount_price, 0) AS maxDiscountPrice, c.issue_limit AS issueLimit, c.start_date AS startDate, c.end_date AS endDate, c.caution AS caution, c.status AS status, c.reg_date AS regDate FROM coupon c WHERE c.coupon_no = #{couponNo} AND c.status IN ('사용', 'ACTIVE') AND (c.start_date IS NULL OR CURDATE() >= c.start_date) AND (c.end_date IS NULL OR CURDATE() <= c.end_date) AND ( c.issue_limit IS NULL OR c.issue_limit > ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_issue ci WHERE ci.coupon_no = c.coupon_no AND ci.status NOT IN ('삭제', 'DELETED') ) )

SELECT c.coupon_no AS couponNo, c.coupon_code AS couponCode, c.seller_no AS sellerNo, c.coupon_type AS couponType, c.coupon_name AS couponName, c.benefit_type AS benefitType, COALESCE(c.benefit_value, 0) AS benefitValue, COALESCE(c.min_order_price, 0) AS minOrderPrice, COALESCE(c.max_discount_price, 0) AS maxDiscountPrice, c.issue_limit AS issueLimit, c.start_date AS startDate, c.end_date AS endDate, c.caution AS caution, c.status AS status, c.reg_date AS regDate FROM coupon c WHERE c.status IN ('사용', 'ACTIVE') AND (c.start_date IS NULL OR CURDATE() >= c.start_date) AND (c.end_date IS NULL OR CURDATE() <= c.end_date) AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM coupon_issue mine WHERE mine.member_no = #{memberNo} AND mine.coupon_no = c.coupon_no AND mine.status NOT IN ('삭제', 'DELETED') ) OR c.issue_limit IS NULL OR c.issue_limit > ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_issue issued WHERE issued.coupon_no = c.coupon_no AND issued.status NOT IN ('삭제', 'DELETED') ) ) ORDER BY c.coupon_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_issue ( issue_code, coupon_no, member_no, status, issue_date ) VALUES ( #{issueCode}, #{couponNo}, #{memberNo}, '발급', NOW() )
